channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.description:
1. Their Phones Were Stolen in London. Then the Threats Started.  The New York Times
  2. In this image taken from a video released by the London Metropolitan Police Service, two men on a moped snatch a woman's phone.  Yahoo News Canada
  3. London Smartphone Extortion Racket Exposes Terrifying Global Cybercrime Crisis  streamlinefeed.co.ke
  4. A whole criminal supply chain exists because Apple made iPhones too hard to steal  PhoneArena
  5. London’s phone theft crisis may have peaked as Met Police crack down  South West Londoner

item.title: Putin wants war concluded this year on victorious terms including Donbas, Bloomberg reports - Euromaidan Press
item.description:
1. Putin wants war concluded this year on victorious terms including Donbas, Bloomberg reports  Euromaidan Press
  2. Bloomberg: Putin wants to conclude war by year's end but only on terms he considers victorious for Russia  Українська правда
  3. Is Russia ‘simulating diplomacy’ because of war losses in Ukraine?  Al Jazeera
  4. Pulling up a chair – Foreign and security policy  ips-journal.eu
  5. Russian elite admits that the war in Ukraine is "not going very well" - ISW  Українські Національні Новини (УНН)

item.title: US said to fire more interceptors to protect Israel in latest Iran war than Israel did - The Times of Israel
item.description:
1. US said to fire more interceptors to protect Israel in latest Iran war than Israel did  The Times of Israel
  2. U.S. bears brunt of Israel’s missile defense, Pentagon assessments show  The Washington Post
  3. Damning Pentagon Leak Reveals Huge Blow to U.S. Defenses  Yahoo News Canada
  4. Pentagon officials worry about Israel's reliance on US interceptors in Iran war  The Jerusalem Post
  5. U.S. missile use in Israel defense raises concerns in East Asia  upi.com

item.title: Who’s to Blame When an Ivy League President Drives Into His Students? - The Ringer
item.description: Who’s to Blame When an Ivy League President Drives Into His Students?  The Ringer
